name: Practically Agents
description: Consulting service helping companies design, build, and deploy production-grade AI agent systems integrated with existing workflows and tools.

name: Notamify
description: AI-powered platform that transforms complex NOTAM data into clear, actionable briefings, streamlining pre-flight preparations for aviation professionals.

name: Purposely
description: A browser extension that helps you focus on your goals.

name: pyaixm
description: Python bindings for AIXM (Aeronautical Information Exchange Model), enabling parsing and working with AIXM 5.1 XML messages for aviation data like airports, airspaces, runways, and waypoints.

name: On Marketing Assets Gen
description: A prototype Instagram post generator for the On brand, built with Google ADK. Chains two agents — an ideation agent that reads mood boards and product catalogs, and an assets generator that produces image variations using Gemini.

name: Launch Soon
description: Waitlist generator that generates waitlists that look like pages, not forms.

name: wdio-aws-device-farm-service
description: AWS Device Farm service for WebdriverIO that enables desktop browser testing on AWS infrastructure.

name: Sr. Jr. Games
description: A father-son game development studio creating fun games and sharing tutorials on developing games with kids.

name: Pigeon Revenge
description: A fun infinite runner game where you play as a pigeon taking revenge on pedestrians. A father-and-son game dev project.

name: FamilyKit
description: A Flutter app for organizing family life — calendar, notes, and chores management in one place.

name: Sauna Tracker
description: A Fitbit smartwatch app for tracking hot and cold exposure sessions to optimize sauna and cold therapy routines.

name: SiteShooter
description: A web application for capturing website screenshots, powered by serverless infrastructure.

name: Stencilbot
description: A tool for automating social media preview image generation — Twitter cards, OG images, YouTube thumbnails, and blog headers from templates.

name: vue-forminator
description: Schema-based form fields factory for Vue.js that generates form components from JSON schemas with support for Bootstrap and Bulma.
